reasoning: RULE A applied: get_japan_heritage returned 104 authoritative 文化庁 日本遺産 stories — real official data — but the tool scope does not cover pilgrimage routes (Kumano Kodo, Saigoku 33, Dewa Sanzan, etc.). The response's own tool_scope_note explicitly flags this mismatch and redirects to search_area(q='修験道'/'山岳信仰'). Main payload is almost entirely off-topic for spiritual pilgrimage queries; advisory saves it from a complete miss but cannot substitute for actual pilgrimage data. RULE B: single root cause (retrieval failure / wrong tool) → intent and specificity take the hit; other dims scored on data quality of what was actually returned.
missing_data: Canonical pilgrimage routes beyond Shikoku 88: Saigoku 33 Kannon, Bando 33, Chichibu 34, Kumano Kodo (Nakahechi/Kohechi), Dewa Sanzan pilgrimage, Shikoku-related Ohenro context, Osorezan, Koyasan pilgrimage circuit. None of these appear in the returned payload.
improvement_hint: Add a pilgrimage-route intent keyword cluster to the browse_advisory (matching 'pilgrimage', '巡礼', 'henro', 'kannon', 'Saigoku', 'Bando', 'Kumano Kodo') that immediately redirects to search_area(q='巡礼') or a dedicated get_pilgrimages tool, rather than returning 104 unrelated Japan Heritage stories as the primary payload.
